steps.expected: Dashboard page loads with spending summary
steps.observed: Dashboard loaded with Monthly Spending widget showing $3,179.34

steps.expected: Total spending for current month excluding transfers and income
steps.observed: $3,179.34 displayed prominently under 'Monthly Spending' heading

steps.expected: Top categories listed with amounts
steps.observed: Top 5 categories shown: Rent/Home $2,000.00, Groceries $448.78, Eating Out $186.57, Home Goods $180.42, Insurance $150.00

steps.action: View Budget Status widget on dashboard
steps.expected: Summary of budget health with on-track, approaching, and over-budget counts
steps.observed: Budget Status widget shows: 5 On Track, 0 Approaching, 3 Over Budget

steps.expected: Individual category progress bars shown
steps.observed: Progress bars displayed for: Bars/Clubs/Going Out 23%, Clothing 50%, Eating Out 62%, Groceries 75%, Home Goods 180% (red, over budget)

steps.action: View Recent Transactions section on dashboard
steps.expected: 5-10 most recent transactions with date, name, amount, and category
steps.observed: 10 recent transactions displayed with all required fields

steps.expected: Each shows date, name, amount, and category
steps.observed: Each transaction shows: name (e.g., 'TEST-AICAT: Gas Station Shell'), date ('Mar 17, 2026'), account ('Alliant Primary Checking'), category ('Groceries'), and formatted amount ('-$30.00')

steps.expected: Between 5 and 10 transactions shown
steps.observed: Exactly 10 transactions shown

steps.action: View Net Worth widget on dashboard
steps.expected: Current net worth displayed with trend indicator
steps.observed: Net Worth widget shows $187,414.09

steps.expected: Change from previous month or sparkline shown
steps.observed: Text reads 'No previous month snapshot for comparison.' — this is the correct fallback when no previous snapshot exists for trend comparison

steps.action: View Spending by Category chart on dashboard
steps.expected: Pie or donut chart showing spending breakdown by category
steps.observed: Donut chart displayed with labeled percentages: Rent/Home 63%, Groceries 14%, Eating Out 6%, Home Goods 6%, Insurance 5%, Clothing 2%, Vacations 2%, Bars/Clubs/Going Out 1%, Subscriptions 1%

steps.expected: Legend with category names
steps.observed: Color-coded legend below chart with all 9 spending categories listed

steps.expected: Comparison table or chart showing current vs previous month
steps.observed: Table displayed with columns: Category, February 2026, March 2026, Change

steps.expected: Each category shows both months' spending and the difference
steps.observed: All 9 categories listed with Feb and March amounts. E.g., Groceries: $50.00 (Feb) vs $448.78 (Mar), Change ↗$398.78

steps.expected: Increases and decreases visually highlighted
steps.observed: Increases shown with red up-arrow (↗) icon and red text for change amounts

steps.expected: Total matches sum of non-transfer expense transactions
steps.observed: Dashboard shows $3,179.34

steps.expected: All March 2026 non-transfer, non-income transactions sum to dashboard total
steps.observed: Navigated to /transactions and verified 19 non-transfer expense transactions for March 2026. Raw transaction sum = $3,179.34

steps.expected: API data confirms totals
steps.observed: curl to /api/transactions?month=2026-03 confirmed all transaction amounts. Applied split allocations for transactions #20 (Groceries $80 + Home Goods $20) and #21 (Groceries $60 + Eating Out $40)

steps.expected: Category amounts match actual transaction sums per category
steps.observed: All categories verified: Rent/Home $2,000.00, Groceries $448.78 (includes split portions), Eating Out $186.57 (includes $40 split), Home Goods $180.42 (includes $20 split), Insurance $150.00, Clothing $74.50, Vacations $52.10, Bars/Clubs/Going Out $45.00, Subscriptions $41.97. Sum = $3,179.34 ✓

steps.expected: Transfer transactions not counted in spending
steps.observed: 3 transfer transactions (Test Grocery Purchase $42.50, Transfer to Savings $1,000.00, TEST-TXN: Edited Coffee Visit $35.00) all excluded from spending total

steps.expected: Income transactions not counted in spending
steps.observed: Paycheck - Employer (+$5,000.00) excluded from spending total

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. Dashboard displays monthly spending summary ($3,179.34) with top categories, budget status (5 on track, 0 approaching, 3 over budget), 10 recent transactions, net worth ($187,414.09 with no-previous-snapshot fallback), spending donut chart, month-over-month comparison table, and all data verified accurate against transaction records including split transaction allocations.
